---
title: "Advanced Empirical Research Methods"
subtitle: Assigment 1 — README
author: "Candidate Number: 1091806"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: pdf_document
---

# MT25 Assignment 1 — File Description for Part 1

**Candidate Number:** 1091806

All Julia scripts are in the `part1_scripts/` folder.


| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `exercise1.jl` | Script for Exercise 1 |
| `exercise2.jl` | Script for Exercise 2 |
| `ex2_kfe.jl` | Kolmogorov Forward Equation for stationary distribution for Exercise 2 |
| `ex2_parameters.jl` | Parameter definitions for Exercise 2 |
| `ex2_vfi.jl` | Value function iteration for Exercise 2 |
